headline: Chubb’s Best Year Ever Sets Up a Run to $363.54 in 12 Months
summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) trades at $329.99 as of writing, and our proprietary model points to meaningful upside. The 24/7 Wall St. price target for Chubb is $363.54, implying 10.17% upside over the next 12 months. Our model assigns a 90% confidence level to this target. headline: Chubb Ltd (NYSE:CB) Posts Strong Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Despite Muted Market Reaction
summary: Chubb's Q1 2026 earnings smash estimates with EPS of $6.82 and revenue of $15.3B, though shares dip slightly after hours.

headline: Chubb Reports First Quarter Per Share Net Income and Core Operating Income of $5.88 and $6.82, Respectively, Up 78.8% and 85.2%; Consolidated Net Premiums Written of $14.0 Billion, Up 10.7%, with P&C and Life Insurance Up 7.2% and 33.1%; P&C Combined Ratio of 84.0%
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) today reported net income for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 of $2.32 billion, or $5.88 per share, and core operating income of $2.69 billion, or $6.82 per share. Book value per share and tangible book value per share increased 15.8% and 21.5%, respectively, from March 31, 2025 and now stand at $189.93 and $126.65. headline: Chubb (CB) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: For the quarter, very strong double-digit increases in underwriting and life income along with record investment income, led to core operating income of nearly $3 billion or $7.52 per share up about 22% and 25%, respectively.  For perspective, over the past 3 and 5 years, core operating income has grown 55% and over 200%.
